temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with long dark hair, wearing a brown shirt, screams in terror. He is in a bathroom, facing a woman with long dark hair who is wearing a blue robe. She holds a large, bloody axe over her shoulder, poised to strike him. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a high-stakes, violent confrontation, positioning the woman as a menacing and threatening figure.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, metallic clanging sound effect accompanies the man's scream, creating a sense of immediate danger.)
(00:02-00:05) The woman, now holding a small child in her arms, moves towards a high window in the bathroom. She frantically tries to pry the window open with her hands, while the child looks on in fear. (Storyline: The woman's objective shifts from attacking the man to escaping, suggesting she is trying to get away with the child. Her desperation is clear.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Tense, dramatic music begins to swell, accompanied by the sound of the woman's grunts and the rattling of the window frame.)
